name: openEuler sig-Space SIG
description: SIG-Space focuses on building a high-reliability, strong real-time, and intelligent full-scenario collaborative open-source ecosystem for space computing, covering aerospace (satellite constellations, deep space exploration) and low-altitude (UAV, eVTOL) domains based on openEuler.

worksFor.name: 北京航天微系统与信息技术研究所
成都菁蓉联创科技有限公司
北京邮电大学/一苇宇航（北京）科技有限公司

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Space SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for SIG-Space focuses on building a high-reliability, strong real-time, and intelligent full-scenario collaborative open-source ecosystem for space computing, covering aerospace (satellite constellations, deep space exploration) and low-altitude (UAV, eVTOL) domains based on openEuler.. The SIG has 17 core members and maintains 0 repositories in the Embedded and IoT domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-Space SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-Space SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at sig-Space@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-Space SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Space SIG maintains 0 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-Space.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-Space SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Space SIG has 4 Maintainers, including: Wayne Ren, 蔡鑫奇, 郑国玲. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
